lines.english: Says Nanak, sing continually the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
Your face shall be radiant, and your consciousness shall be immaculately pure. ||4||19||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
The Fulfiller of desires saves mortals in the end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੋ ਪਿਆਰੋ ਤਾ ਕੈਸੀ ਭੂਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon mero piaaro taa kaisee bhookhaa |
lines.english: You are my Beloved, so what hunger can I have?
The nine treasures are Yours - all treasures are Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਦੂਖਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: toon man vasiaa lagai na dookhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When You dwell within my mind, pain does not touch me. ||1||Pause||
Whatever You do, is acceptable to me.
O True Lord and Master, True is Your Order. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai taa har gun gaau |
lines.english: When it is pleasing to Your Will, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਘਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਨਿਆਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: terai ghar sadaa sadaa hai niaau |3|
lines.english: Within Your Home, there is justice, forever and ever. ||3||
O True Lord and Master, You are unknowable and mysterious.
Nanak is committed to Your service. ||4||20||
His Creative Power is all-pervading, in form and color. ||1||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕਟਿ ਜੀਅ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: nikatt jeea kai sad hee sangaa |
lines.english: He is near at hand; He is the eternal Companion of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ੍ਹੈ ਨ ਝੁਰੈ ਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਰੋਵਨਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: karhai na jhurai naa man rovanahaaraa |
lines.english: My mind does not worry; it does not grieve, or cry out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਵਿਗਤੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਲਾਮਤਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avinaasee avigat agochar sadaa salaamat khasam hamaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Imperishable, Unshakable, Unapproachable and forever safe and sound is my Husband Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਸਰੇ ਕਉ ਕਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: tere daasare kau kis kee kaan |
lines.english: Unto whom does Your servant pay homage?
That slave, whom God has released from the restrictions of social status
His King preserves his honor. ||2||
The Lord is absolutely independent, and totally care-free;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਲਉਡੇ ਕਉ ਕਿਸ ਕੀ ਤਾਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis laudde kau kis kee taat |3|
lines.english: - who can now hold him in bondage? ||3||
O servant Nanak, chant His Glorious Praises. ||4||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਹੋਛੈ ਰਸਿ ਮਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ras chhodd hochhai ras maataa |
lines.english: Forsaking the Lord's sublime essence, the mortal is intoxicated with false essences.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ghar meh vasat baahar utth jaataa |1|
lines.english: The substance is within the home of the self, but the mortal goes out to find it. ||1||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨੀ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਸਚੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਕਾਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: sunee na jaaee sach amrit kaathaa |
lines.english: He cannot hear the true ambrosial discourse.
He takes his wages from his Lord and Master, but he serves another.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਰਿ ਕਰਤ ਝੂਠੀ ਲਗਿ ਗਾਥਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raar karat jhootthee lag gaathaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Attached to false scriptures, he is engaged in argument. ||1||Pause||
With such sins, the mortal is engrossed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲੂਕ ਜੋ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੰਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: tis siau look jo sad hee sangee |
lines.english: He tries to hide from the One who is always with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਸੋ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਮੰਗੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaam na aavai so fir fir mangee |3|
lines.english: He begs from Him, again and again. ||3||
As it pleases Him, He cherishes us. ||4||22||
Says Nanak, God is merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਧਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea praan dhan har ko naam |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is my soul, my life, my wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਅਵਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਥੋਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin har naam avar sabh thoraa |
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, everything else is useless.
Here and hereafter, it is with me, to help me. ||1||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
Gurbani is the jewel, the treasure of devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tripat aghaavai har darasan man moraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind is satisfied and satiated by the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||1||Pause||
Singing, hearing and acting upon it, one is enraptured. ||2||
My mind is attached to the Lord's Lotus Feet.
The True Guru, in His Pleasure, has given this gift. ||3||
Unto Nanak, the Guru has revealed these instructions:
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
recognize the Imperishable Lord God in each and every heart. ||4||23||
He Himself embellishes His own works. ||1||
Perfect is the Creation of the Perfect Lord Master.
The All-pervading Lord has established joys and celebrations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan jaa kee niramal soe |
lines.english: His Name is the treasure; His reputation is immaculate.
He Himself is the Creator; there is no other. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਿਪੁਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਹੀ ਸੋਭ ਜਾ ਕੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bharipur dhaar rahee sobh jaa kee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His magnificent greatness is totally all-pervading. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭ ਕੈ ਸਾਥਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: rav rahiaa prabh sabh kai saath |3|
lines.english: God is pervading in all, and is always with them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਹਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh taa kai haath |
lines.english: All beings and creatures are in His Hands.
